criterion: Particle detection accuracy validation (>90% detection rate)

methodology.description: Provisional baseline generated from automated final pipeline outputs; manual reference counting still pending. Detection rate cannot be computed until manual counts are supplied for both reference images.

finalize_instructions: Provide manual particle counts for img_RDBS_0050 and img_RDBS_0485.
Compute aggregate_detection_rate as the mean of the two per-image detection rates (or weighted by manual totals if project policy requires).
Set status to finalized once manual counts are entered and criterion pass/fail is resolved against the >90% PRD threshold.
Update acceptance_matrix_status.json to change this criterion from pending_manual_validation to passed/failed.
